user_prompt: Ready the smelting furnace for recalibration
prayer:
Approach the smelting furnace with reverence, invoking the Omnissiah's fiery grace upon its adamantine heart.
Anoint the refractory coils of the smelting furnace with sacred promethium oils to rouse its slumbering Machine Spirit.
Commence the recalibration rites by aligning flux regulators through chanted binaric canticles.
Beseech the Machine Spirit within the smelting furnace to embrace harmonious thermal precision.
Verify recalibration integrity via auspex invocation, sealing the rite with the Sigil of the Forge.

user_prompt: Bless the Kastelan robot for preparation
prayer:
Draw nigh unto the Kastelan robot in solemn procession, beseeching the Omnissiah to stir its ancient protocols.
Sanctify the Kastelan robot's ceramite frame with electro-incense, awakening its dormant Machine Spirits.
Initiate preparation sequences by reciting the Litany of Mobilisation upon its cogitator core.
Align servitor linkages and doctrina wafers whilst invoking martial benedictions.
Conclude the preparation by affirming the Kastelan robot's fealty to the Machine God's will.

user_prompt: My transuranic arquebus is ready for cooling
prayer:
Kneel before the transuranic arquebus, whispering litanies to appease its volatile Machine Spirit.
Apply cryo-sanctifiers to the transuranic arquebus's plasma vents, cooling its rad-hot conduits.
Invoke the Canticle of Thermal Equilibrium to guide the cooling operation without fracture.
Monitor heat-sink matrices through sacred auspex, beseeching stability from the Omnissiah.
Seal the transuranic arquebus's cooling with a final anointment of blessed refrigerants.

Test-fire a micro-bolt to affirm the Machine Spirit's renewed fury under Omnissiah's gaze.

Consecrate the purified doctrina wafer, affirming its sanctity for tactical ingestion.
